generic.title: Unexpected error
generic.lead: The page hit a problem. You can retry, go back, or return home.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.lead: This URL doesn’t exist (or it moved). If you typed it, double-check the address.

notFound.0: Try the navigation menu — most pages live there.
notFound.1: If this was a bookmark, it may have changed.
notFound.2: Switch language and retry if the content is localized.

generic.0: Reload the page — transient issues happen.
generic.1: Go back and try a different path.
generic.2: If it keeps happening, report it with the details.

about.title: Software Engineer. I build things end-to-end.

me.title: About me
me.body: Software engineer specializing in modern web applications. I develop solutions ranging from APIs and business logic to efficient user interfaces. I enjoy building well-structured and maintainable software, paying close attention to both system design and user experience. I also have experience working with Linux environments, automated deployments, and CI/CD tools. I enjoy continuous learning and tackling technical challenges that require analysis and sound architectural decisions.

groups.title: Process & AI Tooling
items: Technical docs that people actually read

timeline.title: Full Stack Developer · DTIC - MINSAL
timeline.description: Development of public platforms and internal systems for the Ministry of Health: new features, integrations, monitoring and performance improvements in Vue 3 and Laravel.

timeline.title: ReportFIA · FIA - Universidad de El Salvador
timeline.description: Development of an incident management and reporting system for the Planning Unit of the Faculty of Engineering and Architecture.

timeline.title: Full Stack Developer · Carmencita Store
timeline.description: Built an ERP for inventory, HR and delivery on the coast. SCRUM planning, interfaces in Figma and deployments coordinated with the admin team.

timeline.title: Frontend Intern · Presidency / CASATIC
timeline.description: Digital skills program focused on testing, deployment and agile methodologies for public innovation.
